mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO SYS_FILE_BUSINESS(BUSINESS_ID, FILE_ID) VALUES (#{entity.businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.fileId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER(ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM,VOLUME_TON, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoAgentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.ticketNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.volumeTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.statementStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.statementStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
